titleStmt.title: SII 15.37: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 37. (B.K. No. 106 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEWADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab near the Rudragaṇṭi Rāmaliṅga temple.
This is dated the 11th regnal year of the king, Vibhava, Āshāḍha śu. 7, Friday, Dakshiṇāyana-saṁkrānti, corresponding to 1148 A.D., June 25, Friday, on which day the Saṁkrānti commenced at °92.

It registers a gift of land, after purchase from the Ūroḍeya Śaṅkaradēva and his two sons, by Śaṅkarayya, son of Tikeya Shaṇaṅgi, for worship and repairs in the temple of Tikēśvara and the maṭha attached to it and for feeding and clothing the ascetics and pupils therein. The gift was entrusted to the teacher Yōgīśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 141 of South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. XI. Part II.
div.p:
mattamā tikeya ṣaṇaṁgi
yara magasaṁkarayaṁgaḷu . svasti śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpacakravartti jagadēkulla dēvavarṣa
11 neya vibhava saṁvatsarada Āśāḍha śuddha 7 śukravāradaṁdina dakṣiṇāyana saṁkrāṁti
byatīpāta parvvanimittaṁ . dēgulada maṭhada khaṁḍasphuṭita navakarmma tapōdhanara cchātrara śanābchā
danakkaṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ . sāśvatalakṣmiyaṁ taḷadu śiṣṭajana tuṣṭarāge sarbbēśvara nā
tmasaṁmatanenippakhiḷāgama viśvaṁ jasakke tāne kuḍutirddapaneṁbina virddanalte yōgīśpara
dēvanī vasudheyoḷmudadiṁ bṛṁdavaṁditaṁ . svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāya
dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāna japasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpaṁnaruṁ paramanaiṣṭhikarumappa śrīma
tu varayōgīśvaradēva ṇaṁgaḷanoludu kaṟci dhāreyaneṟedā nijadhanamanittaṁ nira
vadyaṁ śaṁkarayyanī dhare pogaḷal . Antā pūjyadhananittadhanadiṁdaṁ śrīmadūroḍeyaṁ śaṁkaradēvara
sara Avara magaṁ cikka śaṁkaradēvarasena nāraṇadēvarasana Antā mūvara kayyalumavara sa
rbbamānyada keyyaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ paḍedī sthānakke koṭṭa keyi mattaru mūvatta nālku bahubhirvva
sudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasērtunṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē sālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānē tānbhāginaḥ pā
rtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha rēti vasuṁ
dharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . maṁgaḷamahā śrī ©
teṟeveṁ kiruveṟeyaṁ poladeṟeyaṁ mānyakke baṁda teṟeyadevattiṟavēḷku
meṁba pātakanarudiṁgaḷoḷeṁdigunumavanadhōgatigaḷiguṁ . Irisuvudu paramanaiṣṭhikavara
muniyaṁ prabhumahājanaṁgaḷu kāṁtāvaranādananī sthānadaliralīyade kaḷevudinitanāṁ prārtthisidēṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
